text: Reaction: After an honored character you control wins a conflict as the attacker, bow this stronghold - gain 2 honor.
name: Seven Fold Palace

text: Eminent. (This province starts the game faceup and cannot be turned facedown. It cannot be a stronghold province.) As an additional cost to attack another province you control, your opponent must spend 1 fate to an unclaimed ring.
name: Foothills Keep

text: Action: During a conflict at an [element-fire] province, choose a participating character - that character gets +3 glory until the end of the conflict.
name: Honor's Reward

text: Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province, faceup.) Interrupt: When the conflict phase ends, if you control 1 or fewer broken provinces - gain 1 honor.
name: Pious Guardian

text:
This character cannot be evaded by the covert keyword.
You can trigger each ability on a province you control an additional time each round (or specified period).
flavorText: "Let them come. We are overdue for a glorious victory."
name: Hida Etsuji

text: Covert. (When this character attacks, choose one character without covert. That character cannot be declared as a defender.) Interrupt: When the effects of an event would initiate, discard an honored status token from this character - cancel those effects.
name: Master of the Court

text: Seeker role only. Rally. Interrupt: When a character you control would leave play, choose a facedown province you control - put that character into that province instead, adding each attachment on it to its owner's hand.
name: Master of Many Lifetimes

text: Keeper role only. Reaction: After this character wins a [conflict-military] conflict, choose a dishonored status token and a character - move the status token to the chosen character.
flavorText: "Lay down your sword now and we will show you mercy." - Daidoji Netsu
name: Fearless Skirmisher

text: Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province, faceup.) Action: Each player chooses up to one Bushi character they played this phase - honor each of those characters.
name: Honored Veterans

text: Reaction: After you pass on declaring a conflict - gain 1 honor.
flavorText: They came to her to receive a fair verdict on the child's inheritance. She sent both away with nothing, for both had approached the dispute with dishonorable rancor.
name: Asako Lawmaster

text: Reaction: After you pass on declaring a conflict - put an honor token on this holding. Then, put X cards from your hand on the bottom of your conflict deck and draw that many cards, where X is the number of honor tokens on this holding. Any player may trigger this ability. (Unlimited.)
name: Endless Archives

text: Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province, faceup.) Interrupt: When this character leaves play, if you are less honorable than an opponent - gain 2 honor.
name: Beautiful Entertainer

text: Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict in which this character is participating - search the top 8 cards of your dynasty deck for a non-unique character with printed cost 3 or lower and put that character into play in the conflict. Shuffle.
name: Shinjo Altansarnai

text: Keeper role only. Rally. During conflicts in which you are the attacking player, you may trigger the attacked province's ability as if you controlled that province.
name: Contested Countryside

text: Interrupt: When a character with printed cost equal to or lower than the number of unbroken provinces you control would leave play - it remains in play instead.
flavorText: "What if you are the sword that stems the tide of darkness?" - Kaiu Shihobu
name: Ceaseless Duty

text: Action: Choose up to 2 honored characters with total printed cost of 6 or less - ready each of those characters.
flavorText: At the sight of her joy, a thousand poems were born.
name: Elegance and Grace

text: Attach to a character you control. Attached character gains the Tattooed trait. Reaction: After a province you control is revealed - ready attached character.
flavorText: "It is a lovely design. But have you discovered its purpose?" - Togashi Hassuno
name: Waterfall Tattoo

text: Earth Role only. Reaction: After a phase begins - you cannot lose honor this phase.
flavorText: "I fought alongside my betrothed in his victories, as Matsu once fought beside Akodo-no-Kami." - Matsu Tsuko
name: Divine Ancestry

text: Water role only. Action: Choose a non-Mythic character you own - put that character into a non-stronghold province you control. (It is now out of play.)
name: The Receding Tide

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a card in a non-stronghold province - move that card to another non-stronghold province controlled by the same player.
flavorText: "My secrets are illuminated by Ameterasu's light alone."
name: Soshi Diviner

text: Reduce the cost to play this card by 2 if your opponent has 4 or more facedown cards in their provinces. Action: During a conflict - reveal each facedown card in your opponent's provinces. Then, put up to 2 characters with total printed cost 6 or lower from their provinces into play in the conflict under your control. Errata from RRG v16 (2021-01-05)
name: Stoke Insurrection

text: Water role only. Action: During a conflict, lose 1 honor and discard a card from your hand - set the attacked province's base strength to 0 until the end of the conflict.
name: Command By Name
